name: diff-native
description: High-performance text diffing library built with Rust and WebAssembly
author: Denis Panov

scripts.build:wasm:node: wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg && node scripts/prepare-node-wasm-snippets.mjs pkg/snippets
scripts.build:node: mkdir -p dist/node && cp -r pkg/* dist/node/ && cp src/node-index.js dist/node/index.js
scripts.build:browser: mkdir -p dist/browser && cp -r pkg-web/* dist/browser/ && cp src/browser-index.js dist/browser/index.js
scripts.build:esm: mkdir -p dist/esm && cp -r pkg-web/* dist/esm/ && cp src/esm-index.js dist/esm/index.js
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:wasm:node && bun run build:wasm:web && bun run build:ts && bun run build:node && bun run build:browser && bun run build:esm
scripts.bench:full: bun run build && bun run bench:bun -- --suite full
scripts.bench:quick: bun run build && bun run bench:bun -- --suite quick
scripts.bench:baseline: bun run build && bun run bench:bun -- --suite full --baseline
scripts.bench:full:node: bun run build && bun run bench:build && bun run bench:node -- --suite full
scripts.bench:quick:node: bun run build && bun run bench:build && bun run bench:node -- --suite quick
scripts.bench:baseline:node: bun run build && bun run bench:build && bun run bench:node -- --suite full --baseline
scripts.bench:compare:node: bun run bench:build && bun run bench:node -- --compare-only
scripts.check: biome check . && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.fix: biome check --write . && cargo fmt --all && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run check
